task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite, and a single-record RIS file is at /home/user/Documents/new_papers.ris.

Import /home/user/Documents/new_papers.ris into the library (it may live directly in 'My Library' or inside an auto-created import collection — either is acceptable). After import, an item titled 'GPT-4 Technical Report' of type `journalArticle` must exist in the library, and the total item count must be at least 5. Leave Zotero running.
